<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="vBjB-ZxxOQZhVkTg0171" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-529" dy="-186" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="Long-Running Agent Session Lifecycle" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="840" x="80" y="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=4;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="950" x="30" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1-lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a5c1a;" value="Session 1 — Initializer Agent (runs once)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="380" x="44" y="62" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f9dbc8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Receive High-Level Prompt" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="152" x="50" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f9dbc8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Expand into Feature List
(JSON / Failing Tests)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="250" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1c" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f9dbc8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Write init.sh and
Setup Environment" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="162" x="478" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1d" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f9dbc8;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=11;" value="Create progress.txt
and Initial Git Commit" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="172" x="700" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-s1ab" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1a" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="s1b" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-s1bc" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1b" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="s1c" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-s1cd" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1c" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="s1d" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-s1-state" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1-bg" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=2;fontSize=11;" target="state-bg" value="Persist State"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="state-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=4;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="620" x="185" y="234" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="state-lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7a5c00;" value="Shared Persistent State (Disk / VCS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="320" x="199" y="238" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="st1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=10;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="progress.txt" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="118" x="205" y="264" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="st2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=10;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="features.json (failing/passing)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="164" x="342" y="264" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="st3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=10;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Git History" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="526" y="264" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="st4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=10;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="init.sh" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="646" y="264" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-state-sn" edge="1" parent="1" source="state-bg" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=2;fontSize=11;" target="sn-bg" value="Restore State"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sn-bg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=4;pointerEvents=0;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="290" width="950" x="30" y="368" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sn-lbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#00508a;" value="Session N — Coding Agent (repeating)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="380" x="44" y="372" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sna" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Read Progress File
and Git Log" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="50" y="408" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="snb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Run init.sh and
Smoke Tests" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="226" y="408" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="snc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Select Next
Failing Feature" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="396" y="408" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="snd" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Implement and
Test Feature" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="566" y="408" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-snab" edge="1" parent="1" source="sna" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="snb" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-snbc" edge="1" parent="1" source="snb" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="snc" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-sncd" edge="1" parent="1" source="snc" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="snd" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="done" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;" value="All Features
Passing?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="118" x="740" y="396" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-snddone" edge="1" parent="1" source="snd" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="done" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="complete" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Task Complete" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="78" x="886" y="408" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-done-yes" edge="1" parent="1" source="done" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="complete" value="Yes"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sne" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;" value="Commit and Update
Progress File" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="138" x="740" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-done-sne" edge="1" parent="1" source="done" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="sne" value="No"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-done-no" edge="1" parent="1" source="sne" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#b85450;fontStyle=2;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="sna" value="No: Next Session"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="809" y="630" /> <mxPoint x="50" y="630" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
